Selected prompt text:
Provide a highly condensed, single-file Python implementation of a greedy heuristic to solve the optimization problem. Ensure the entire script is provided as a single, continuous string within the FINAL_ANSWER field of the JSON response, using escaped newlines (\n) and avoiding markdown code fences. Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S1-ahc001-atcoder-ad
Title: S1. AHC001 / AtCoder Ad

Problem:
Place many non-overlapping axis-aligned ad rectangles in a 10000 x 10000 square so each advertiser gets a rectangle containing its requested point and with area close to its requested target area.

Grading target:
Continuous score from advertiser satisfaction.
Higher is better.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

authored_response.decision_notes: The user requested a highly condensed Python implementation for a specific optimization problem (AHC001). I will provide a greedy heuristic that places rectangles around requested points, ensuring they don't overlap and stay within bounds.
